locations.name: 巴伊亞州
locations.summary: 巴伊亚（葡萄牙語：Bahia）是巴西的26个州之一，地处东北部。面积565,733平方千米，首府是萨尔瓦多。巴伊亚北部是阿拉戈斯州、塞尔希培州、伯南布哥州和皮奥伊州，东部是大西洋，西部有戈亚斯州和托坎廷斯州，南部有米纳斯吉拉斯州和聖埃斯皮…

locations.name: 圣埃斯皮里图州
locations.summary: 聖埃斯皮里圖州（葡萄牙語：Espírito Santo，(e)s.'pi.ɾi.tu 'sɐ̃.tu）是巴西的一個州，其州名是基督宗教中「聖靈」的意思。位於東南部大西洋岸。面積46,077.519平方公里，2005年人口3,412,746…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Brown-winged schiffornis
relations.evidence: The brown-winged schiffornis, or brown-winged mourner, (Schiffornis turdina) is a species of Neotropical bird in the family Tityridae, the tityras, becards, and allies. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia

relations.subject: Brown-winged schiffornis
relations.evidence: turdina: southeastern Brazil from southern Bahia south to Espírito Santo The brown-winged schiffornis primarily inhabits the interior of humid forest; it also is found, though rarely, at the forest edge, in secondary forest, and in drier forest. It elevation it reaches in Venezuela, in Ecuador, in Peru, and in Brazil.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L
